creator: Julie Bort
title: (No AI) OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
dc:creator: Julie Bort
content: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.
contentSnippet: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

creator: Anna Heim
title: (No AI) DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
dc:creator: Anna Heim
content: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.
contentSnippet: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

title: (No AI) Jury selection in Musk v. Altman: ‘People don’t like him’
author: Richard Lawler
content:
![An image of Elon Musk in a tuxedo making an odd face. The background is red with weight scales on it.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/chorus/uploads/chorus_asset/file/23906796/VRG_Illo_STK022_K_Radtke_Musk_Scales_2.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

On Monday, the courtroom battle [between Elon Musk and Sam Altman](https://www.theverge.com/tech/917225/sam-altman-elon-musk-openai-lawsuit) over alleged broken promises at OpenAI started, as usual, with jury selection. The only tricky part? A lot of the prospective jurors already have an opinion about Elon Musk, and it's not a good one.

_The Verge_ reporter Elizabeth Lopatto, who was there at the courthouse, quoted statements from some of the juror questionnaires:

> "Elon Musk is a greedy, racist, homophobic piece of garbage."
> 
> "Elon Musk is a world-class jerk."
> 
> "I very much dislike Tesla. As a woman of color, I am very aware of the damaging statements and actions Elon Musk has enacted and been a part of."

M …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/919469/elon-musk-dont-like)
contentSnippet:
On Monday, the courtroom battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman over alleged broken promises at OpenAI started, as usual, with jury selection. The only tricky part? A lot of the prospective jurors already have an opinion about Elon Musk, and it's not a good one.
The Verge reporter Elizabeth Lopatto, who was there at the courthouse, quoted statements from some of the juror questionnaires: 
"Elon Musk is a greedy, racist, homophobic piece of garbage."
"Elon Musk is a world-class jerk."
"I very much dislike Tesla. As a woman of color, I am very aware of the damaging statements and actions Elon Musk has enacted and been a part of."
M …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary: On Monday, the courtroom battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman over alleged broken promises at OpenAI started, as usual, with jury selection. The only tricky part? A lot of the prospective jurors already have an opinion about Elon Musk, and it's not a good one. The Verge reporter Elizabeth Lopatto, who was there at […]

title: (No AI) Google is testing AI chatbot search for YouTube
author: Jay Peters
content:
![A screenshot of the “Ask YouTube” search experience.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/Screenshot-2026-04-27-at-4.55.32PM.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Google is trying out an AI Mode-like search experience for YouTube. The company is [now testing](https://www.youtube.com/new) "a new way to search on YouTube that feels more like a conversation," with results pulling in things like longform videos, YouTube Shorts, and text about what you're searching for. The "experiment" is now available if you're a YouTube Premium subscriber in the US who is 18 or older.

I turned it on for my account. Now, in the search bar, I see an "Ask YouTube" button, and clicking the search bar shows prompts to ask like "funny baby elephant playing clips," "summary of the rules of volleyball," and "short history of the Apollo 11 moon landing." If …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/streaming/919441/google-ask-youtube-ai-chatbot-search)

title: (No AI) OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
content: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
contentSnippet: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.

title: (No AI) The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
content: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
contentSnippet: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.

creator: Maxwell Zeff, Paresh Dave
title: (No AI) Some Musk v. Altman Jurors Don't Like Elon Musk
dc:creator: Maxwell Zeff, Paresh Dave
content: Musk’s lawsuit challenges OpenAI’s evolution under Sam Altman. But during jury selection, several potential jurors voiced negative views of Musk himself.
contentSnippet: Musk’s lawsuit challenges OpenAI’s evolution under Sam Altman. But during jury selection, several potential jurors voiced negative views of Musk himself.

creator: Maxwell Zeff, Paresh Dave
title: (No AI) Elon Musk Boosts New Yorker’s Sam Altman Exposé on X as Trial Begins
dc:creator: Maxwell Zeff, Paresh Dave
content: The move comes as the trial for Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI kicks off in federal court in Oakland.
contentSnippet: The move comes as the trial for Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI kicks off in federal court in Oakland.
